creator: wkwu@csie.nctu.edu.tw
text:
When I execute xconsole, it shows:"Couldn't open console" at xconsole.
I have added 2 line /etc/fbtab:
/dev/ttyv0      0600    /dev/console:/dev/pcaudio:/dev/pcaudioctl
/dev/ttyv1      0600    /dev/console:/dev/pcaudio:/dev/pcaudioctl

at the X-window: ls -l /dev/console
crw-------   1 wkwu     users      0,   0 Oct 16 13:08 /dev/console

Fix: 

no idea.
